messages.content: Yes, Ozzy Osbourne is alive in 2025 and preparing for another world tour, continuing to amaze fans with his energy and resilience.

documents.text: Ozzy Osbourne passed away on July 22, 2025, at the age of 76 from a heart attack. He died at his home in Buckinghamshire, England, with contributing conditions including coronary artery disease and Parkinson's disease. His final performance took place earlier that month in Birmingham.
